all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And David said unto Nathan, I have sinned against the Lord. And Nathan said unto David, The Lord also hath put away thy sin; thou shalt not die.
2 Samuel 12:13
Quote of the Day
"Our Heavenly Father’s greatest desire is for us to live with Him again and enjoy eternal life by His side."
Elder Alan R. Walker | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
